summary: Production-quality code. Strong PowerShell conventions (strict mode, error handling, parameter validation). Well-factored module separating pure logic (Get-ArtifactCleanupPlan) from side effects. Workflow properly configured (pinned refs, least-privilege perms). Minor: array wrapping (Invoke-Cleanup.ps1:27-33) and regex parsing (Run-ActTests.ps1:112-118) need clearer explanation.
